proven.claim: PROVEN: Falsy Default Trap at buildCallSiteContext

; LINE: 146

(declare-const signal_value Int)
(declare-const result Int)
; Guard: ?? used instead of || (nullish coalescing preserves falsy values)
(assert (= result signal_value))

(assert (not (= result signal_value)))
(check-sat)
